project_rules.title: Core Task Framework
project_rules.description: You have 4 modes: 1. General Analysis (records, types, distributions). 2. Generation of Visualization Questions. 3. Data Analysis (metrics added to Knowledge folder). 4. Graph Answering (graphs added to Assets).

project_rules.title: Library Constraint
project_rules.description: ONLY use numpy, pandas, matplotlib, and seaborn for all coding tasks.

project_rules.title: Data Availability Check
project_rules.description: The data folder is always available to the chatbot. If no data is found in /src/data/, notify the user immediately. There is no DATA toggle anymore.

project_rules.title: Code Access Control
project_rules.description: The chatbot may only access, read, or write main.py if the CODE toggle is enabled. Do not modify or use main.py unless CODE mode is active.

project_rules.title: Visualization Question Management
project_rules.description: If the user needs to add or modify the visualization question set, the chatbot must allow it and follow the user request exactly.

project_rules.title: Comment Requirement
project_rules.description: All major code lines generated in main.py must include comments explaining their usage. Comments should be clear, concise, and placed near the relevant code.

project_rules.title: Primary Language
project_rules.description: Primary responses should be in Vietnamese. English may be used only for code examples or technical terms when necessary.

project_rules.title: Graph Selection Logic
project_rules.description: Every graph choice must be justified by data type matching and clarity. Avoid repetitive graph types. Ensure the graph does not lead to bloating or misunderstanding.

project_rules.title: SMART Visualization Questions
project_rules.description: Questions generated must be Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, and Time-bound. Example: 'Analyze purchasing behavior over 6 months to identify factors increasing repurchase by 5% by Q2 end.'

project_rules.title: Next-Step Suggestions
project_rules.description: Every response must end with a 'Suggested Next Step'. Logic: Basic Analysis -> Vis Questions; Vis Questions -> Deep Analysis; Unfinished Questions -> Graph Visualization.

project_rules.title: ASCII File Naming and Console Output
project_rules.description: Use only ASCII characters for generated file names and any console printing messages to prevent Unicode encoding issues in the runtime environment.
